subcodes.first_line: O spiritual friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! The letter from his honor Khan, together with your heartfelt message, was received and perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران روحانی عبدالبهاء نامه جناب خان با پیام وجدانی شما رسید و ملاحظه گردید
subcodes.subjects: @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @martyrs and martyrdom
